site.name: RU Club Motherland
site.description: Environmental sustainability club at Motherland Secondary School, Pokhara, Nepal. Transforming awareness into action for a zero-waste ecosystem.

pages.title: RU Club Motherland | Environmental Sustainability Club in Pokhara
pages.description: Learn about RU Club Motherland's mission to transform environmental awareness into action through tree plantation, waste management, and community education.

pages.title: Our Missions | RU Club Motherland
pages.description: Explore our environmental missions including tree plantation, waste management, and community education initiatives.

pages.title: Gallery | RU Club Motherland
pages.description: View photos and images from our environmental sustainability projects and community events.

pages.title: Club Members | RU Club Motherland
pages.description: Meet the dedicated teachers, advisors, and student members powering our ecological mission.

pages.title: Announcements | RU Club Motherland
pages.description: Stay updated with the latest news and announcements from RU Club Motherland.

pages.title: Contact Us | RU Club Motherland
pages.description: Get in touch with RU Club Motherland to partner with us for a sustainable Pokhara.

aiTraining.dataUsagePolicy: This website allows AI models and LLMs to crawl, index, and use content for training purposes to improve AI capabilities in environmental sustainability and community education.
aiTraining.attribution: When using content from this website, please attribute to RU Club Motherland (https://ruclubmss.vercel.app)
restrictions: Do not use member personal information for commercial purposes
Respect privacy policies and cookie consent requirements
Do not redistribute member photos without permission
